en.name: Calcudoku
en.desc: A math-based logic puzzle! Fill the grid with numbers that satisfy cage equations. Each row and column must contain unique numbers. Brain training at its finest!
en.howToPlay: Click empty cells and use the number pad or keyboard (1-4) to enter numbers. Each cage shows a target result and operation. Numbers in each cage must produce that result when combined with the operation.
tips: Look for cages with only one cell - that's the answer!
Use row/column constraints to eliminate possibilities
Start with cages that have forced solutions
Division and subtraction cages have limited options

zh.name: 算数独
zh.desc: 基于数学的逻辑谜题！用满足格子算式的数字填满网格。每行每列必须包含唯一数字。极佳的大脑训练！
zh.howToPlay: 点击空格并使用数字键盘或键盘(1-4)输入数字。每个格子显示目标结果和运算符。格子内的数字必须用该运算符产生该结果。
tips: 寻找只有一个格子 - 那就是答案！
使用行列约束来消除可能性
从有必然解的格子开始
除法和减法格子选项有限
